name: Cloud Sync
description: Sync clipboard items across devices via WebDAV, SFTP, Google Drive, or OneDrive with optional end-to-end encryption

permissions.reason: Register the Cloud Sync settings panel and status UI

fields.label: Auto sync on startup
fields.description: Run one sync automatically when the app starts

fields.label: Sync interval (minutes)
fields.description: Timed sync interval; 0 disables scheduled sync
